name: mismatched year params with rate type and year splits
description: Verifies that rate type CTE WHERE clause includes the full query-level year range when year splits are active, even when the rate type column has a narrower year range than another column
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2021,2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.primary_position IN ('WR')), "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs_year_2023.nfl_team) as teams, "nfl_games"."year" from "player_gamelogs_year_2023" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) group by "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid"), "rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379" as materialized (select "nfl_games"."year", nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.comp = true THEN nfl_plays.recv_yds ELSE 0 END) AS m_33f2f8aa0da1 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by nfl_plays.trg_pid, "nfl_games"."year"), "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" as materialized (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true THEN recv_yds ELSE 0 END) as rec_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2021, 2022, 2023) group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(trg_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."rec_yds_from_plays" AS "rec_yds_from_plays_0", CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379.m_33f2f8aa0da1) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS rec_yds_from_plays_1, "player_years"."year", "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f" on "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t8af6a5ef7b466cb7dac47160d3c2e87f"."year" = 2023 left join "rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379" on "rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" on "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8.year = player_years.year and "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."year" in (2021, 2022, 2023) where player.primary_position IN ('WR') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."rec_yds_from_plays", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
